allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./packages/games/data/legacy/locations_en.json'\); console.log\('Type:', typeof d, Array.isArray\(d\) ? 'array' : 'object'\); const keys=Object.keys\(d\); console.log\('Top keys:', keys.slice\(0,10\)\); console.log\('Total top-level keys:', keys.length\); const first=d[keys[0]]; console.log\('First entry:', JSON.stringify\(first\).slice\(0,500\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('h:/02.Linbasta/01.Projects/JordglobeWeb/packages/games/data/legacy/locations_en.json'\)\); console.log\('First entry fields:', Object.keys\(data[0]\).sort\(\)\); console.log\('Sample entry:', JSON.stringify\(data[0], null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('h:/02.Linbasta/01.Projects/JordglobeWeb/packages/games/data/legacy/locations_en.json'\)\); console.log\('Total entries:', data.length\); const withCapitalTag = data.filter\(e => e.tags && e.tags.some\(t => t.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('capital'\)\)\); console.log\('Entries with capital in tags:', withCapitalTag.length\); if \(withCapitalTag.length > 0\) { console.log\('Sample:', withCapitalTag[0]\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('h:/02.Linbasta/01.Projects/JordglobeWeb/packages/games/public-prod/stream-locations.json'\)\); console.log\('Total entries:', data.length\); console.log\('First entry fields:', Object.keys\(data[0]\).sort\(\)\); console.log\('Sample entries:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(data.slice\(0, 3\), null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const legData = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('h:/02.Linbasta/01.Projects/JordglobeWeb/packages/games/data/legacy/locations_en.json'\)\); const capitals = legData.filter\(e => e.tags && e.tags.includes\('Capital'\)\); console.log\('Capital entries in legacy data:', capitals.length\); console.log\('Sample capitals:'\); console.log\(capitals.slice\(0, 5\).map\(c => \({ name: c.nameEn, tags: c.tags, difficulty: c.difficulty }\)\)\);")
